reason: The tweet is giving advice about reading certain Surahs before and after studying for better concentration and understanding. It does not contain any content related to ISIS or promoting violence.
original_post: معلومة مفيدةإقرؤا سورة يس قبل المذاكرة لأنها تفتح ١١ ثقب في المخ وبعد المذاكره سورة الضحى📚.
